ability_text: Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.
roll20_value: The Hunt Never Ends — Once per day, declare a target. You gain +2 to all rolls that involve tracking, hunting, or hitting that one target in combat. The target does not need to be known to you; it can just be something you are hunting.

ability_text: Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.
roll20_value: Just Someone in the Crowd — Once per day, as long as you are in or near a crowd, you can instantly lose any pursuit. Gain +2 to Stealth for the purposes of breaking and entering.

ability_text: Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.
roll20_value: Badge Intimidation — Once per day, flash your old credentials and force someone to hesitate or comply, even if you have not been a cop in years. Gain +2 when trying to Bully any Civilian-type NPCs.

ability_text: Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.
roll20_value: Overclocked Brain — Once per day, you can either push your neural processor to triple speed, allowing you to use Hacking twice in a single action, or reroll a failed Hacking attempt.

ability_text: Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.
roll20_value: Blink and You Miss Me — Once per day, move twice as far in one Movement action, ignoring terrain penalties.

ability_text: You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.
roll20_value: War Never Changes — You never freeze in combat. If you are ambushed, you still get a turn before anything hits you.

ability_text: Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.
roll20_value: Lady Luck — Once per day, if you roll a 20 on a D20, replace the result with a 2. Once per day, if you have sacrificed a 20 result, you may replace any other result with a Critical Success.

ability_text: As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.
roll20_value: Built Like a Tank — As long as you are repairing something that belongs to you or an ally, you gain +2 to Jury-Rigging and Engineering.

ability_text: Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.
roll20_value: Rat Runs the Maze — Once per day, you can find a secret, unmonitored path through the city: alleyways, sewer tunnels, maintenance shafts. Even in total lockdown, you always have an escape.

ability_name: See What I Want You to See
ability_text: Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.
roll20_value: See What I Want You to See — Once per day, you can use the GhostWalk hack without having to roll for success.

ability_text: Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.
roll20_value: Get There Fast — Once per Day, you can double the Movement speed of a Vehicle or Mech for one Round.

ability_text: Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.
roll20_value: The Muse Smiles — Once per Day, gain a sudden burst of inspiration, allowing you to gain Advantage (1D4 + your Performance) on a single Non-Combat roll.

ability_text: Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.
roll20_value: Faith Drives Me — Once per Combat, your faith keeps you going. Heal 1D4 HP as a Free Action.

ability_text: Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.
roll20_value: Meat is Weak — Once per Combat as a Bonus Action, you can patch up yourself or an Ally. Roll a DC: 10 First Aid check; on a success, you or your ally heals for 1D6.

ability_name: Say hello to my little (fake) friend!
ability_text: You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.
roll20_value: Say hello to my little (fake) friend! — You have a collection of high-end, hyper-realistic recreations of popular Samurai gear. All of it is non-functional. Once per day, you can produce a fake version of a Tier-three piece of equipment.

ability_text: Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.
roll20_value: Oh, What’s This? — Once per day you can happen upon a useful little gizmo, weapon, or piece of equipment worth below 300Cr from the Civilian Gear tables.

ability_text: Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.
roll20_value: I Studied For This! — Once per day, recall something you have studied, gaining +2 to any non-combat skill for a single roll.

ability_text: Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.
roll20_value: Glitch Mode — Once per Combat, as a Free Action, activate Latent Experimental Cyberware. Roll a D4 for a one-turn effect: super speed, pain resistance, enhanced reflexes, or better vision. Afterward, lose 1D4 HP.

ability_text: Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.
roll20_value: Knockout Blow — Once per day, as a Free Action, you can attempt to Stun an enemy after making a successful Melee hit. The enemy rolls against DC 10 Save to avoid being Stunned for one turn.

ability_text: Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
roll20_value: One Last Encore — Once per day, as a Bonus Action, draw all attention, including enemy aggression, to yourself for one Round. All opponents in a combat scene within 30 Feet must roll a DC: 10 plus your Performance Save. On failure, they must include you in their next Attack Action.
